name: Pulp
bio: Pulp's catalog keeps paying because its most recognizable songs remain culturally specific, lyrically sticky, and easy to revisit.
notable_for: Pulp remains closely associated with Common People and Disco 2000, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Common People and Disco 2000 still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Repeat streaming and playlist familiarity help the biggest songs keep earning after release.
Broad recognition supports social reuse, rediscovery, and steady catalog listening.
Licensing and event-driven playback can create recurring spikes.
